8.text: Okay, here me out. Spotify claims they have lyrics. This is not for all. As a JPOP and KPOP listener, lyrics to those songs do not apply. And if there is, it's either in kanji or hangul. Please make the lyrics to those songs in romaji. Other than that, it's a good app for listening to music. But again, they can't claim they have lyrics. It's one sided, only for songs in english alphabet.
